question: Develop a C++ program that declares a 1D integer array and initializes it. Then, calculate and print the sum of all elements in the array using pointer arithmetic instead of array indexing.
errors: The loop condition `i <= SIZE` causes an out-of-bounds access when `i` equals `SIZE`. This attempts to dereference memory one element past the end of the array, leading to undefined behavior. It should be `i < SIZE`.
